channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘False flag attack’: Iran denies claims it fired missiles at Diego Garcia
item.description: Esmaeil Baghaei denies the long-range missile attack, which could change the calculus of the war for US allies.

item.title: US-Israeli war on Iran strains food, water and fuel prices in India
item.description: Locals in northern India have a growing concern over costs of essential resources due to the Iran war.

item.title: ‘NATO joining US-Israel’s war on Iran is between slim and none’
item.description: ‘NATO joining US-Israel's war on Iran is between slim and none’

item.title: ‘Substantial evidence’ of double-tap strike in killing of Gaza’s Hind Rajab
item.description: Avaaz analyses the timeline of events to conclude that violations show Israel systematically kills first responders.

item.title: UK PM Starmer says no threat from Iran on Britain, calls for de-escalation
item.description: UK PM Keir Starmer says routine assessments conclude that the UK is not a target of Iran amid global tensions.

item.title: Trump shares SNL skit mocking Starmer as he speaks to UK PM over Iran war
item.description: Trump shares SNL-style skit mocking Starmer's panic over his call, the day the two leaders spoke about the war in Iran.

item.title: Has Iran brought down an ‘unkillable’ US F-35 jet?
item.description: The supersonic fighter jet is designed to avoid detection by radar and other technologies.

item.title: Trump postpones military strikes on Iranian power plants for five days
item.description: The US president's announcement comes after he holds ‌'good and ​productive conversations' with Tehran.

item.title: Iraq pulled into Iran war as US targets Iran-aligned groups
item.description: Iraq is increasingly caught between the US and Iran as the regional war escalates, deepening economic woes.

item.title: Threats over Iran war bare Trump efforts to transform free speech: Experts
item.description: Threat to punish broadcasters for coverage not in 'public interest' comes amid wider roll-backs, analysts say.
